---
title: "Assessing seismic hazard in Chile using deep neural networks"
author: "Plaza, F.; Nicolis, O.; Salas, R."
date: '2019-01-01'
date-format: "YYYY"
slug: seismic-hazard-deep-neural-networks
categories:
  - Investigación
  - Deep Learning
  - Sismología
description: "Evaluación del peligro sísmico en Chile utilizando redes neuronales profundas."
image: cover.png
links:
  - icon: file-richtext-fill
    name: DOI
    url: https://doi.org/10.5772/intechopen.83403
  - icon: box-arrow-up-right
    name: Documento
    url: https://www.intechopen.com/online-first/assessing-seismic-hazard-in-chile-using-deep-neural-networks/
lang: es
format:
  html:
    image: cover.png
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple" icon=false}
**Figura representativa:** reemplazar `cover.png` por una figura del artículo o subir material complementario a `figures/`.
:::

## Cita

Plaza, F., Nicolis, O., & Salas, R. (2019). Assessing seismic hazard in Chile using deep neural networks. In *Natural Disasters*. IntechOpen. https://doi.org/10.5772/intechopen.83403
